title: Elementi Frother Wand - Easy to Use Milk Frother Wand & Handheld Electric Stirrer for Powder Drinks, Durable & Powerful Coffee & Protein Powder Mixer Wand, Hand Frother, Coffee Stirrers Electric Mini
description:
About this item
PERFECT FOAM EVERY TIME: Create rich, creamy foam with ease using our double whisk frother. Whether for coffee, matcha, or protein shakes, the Elementi handheld frother delivers flawless results every time. Achieve the perfect texture and elevate your favorite beverages to café-quality from the comfort of home. It's designed for consistent performance, ensuring that every drink is an indulgent experience with minimal effort.
WORKS IN UNDER 30 SECONDS: Enjoy perfectly frothed milk in seconds. This powerful, fast-acting frother wand is lightweight, easy to use, and designed for efficiency. No mess, no fuss—just smooth, creamy froth for coffee or any beverage upgrade. Ideal for daily use, its compact design fits seamlessly into your routine, offering the convenience of quick, professional-quality frothing right at home.
ELEVATE YOUR COFFEE EXPERIENCE: Transform your coffee into a barista-worthy experience with the Elementi frother. Whether crafting cappuccinos, lattes, or macchiatos, this easy-to-use drink mixer tool delivers beautifully frothed milk that makes every cup feel special. With its powerful performance, you can recreate your favorite café drinks at home, ensuring every sip is a delightful treat.
MORE THAN COFFEE: Expand your drink-making possibilities beyond coffee. This versatile, professional frother not only froths milk but also blends protein shakes, mixes matcha, and stirs powdered drinks with ease. It's your all-in-one solution for a wide variety of beverages, allowing you to explore endless drink options with one convenient tool that brings smooth consistency to every mix.
NO-HASSLE QUALITY GUARANTEE: Our frother is built for lasting performance, backed by a no-hassle guarantee. Should you encounter any issues, we offer a full money-back or replacement promise. With this reliable frother wand, you can confidently create delicious, perfectly frothed drinks, knowing you're supported by a quality guarantee that ensures your satisfaction.
reviews_5s:
Easy to use, clean and makes an abundant amount of froth. Light weight. We use it everyday.This works great for Hot Chocolate and my Specialty Coffee DrinksGood little frotherI liked that it was as described. I only used it once. I just received it yesterday. I used it to make a smoothie using protein powder and almond milk. It worked great. Very satisfiedEasy to use . Its got a nice even high speed wise. Perfect for my morning coffee.Great little tool my wife and I love it!works great! arrived on time.I don't write many Amazon review these days, but I was compelled to write one for this product.

I use whey protein powder regularly, mixed in a glass of water. Mixing by hand with a spoon has never been sufficient. It always leaves clumps of undissolved powder. I bought this specifically to help with that.

This device demonstrated its value literally within seconds of its first use. I filled a glass with water, added the powder, inserted and activated the device. The solution was mixed clump-free almost instantly. This is not an exaggeration. I was beside myself. I had a perfectly mixed, clump-free protein shake in seconds.

I'll never make another shake without it. If you make powder-based drinks, I would highly recommend it.

Now I'm encouraged to try it for other its applications as well.With this being as low priced as it was, I did not think it would work. But boy was I wrong. It makes a froth like never seen from such a small item. Definitely worth the time and trouble of checking it out and getting one for yourself.After 2 months, it’s still working just as well as more expensive rechargeable ones! I think the standard battery type are the way to go. We had a rechargeable one, but eventually the button on it broke (and constantly stayed on), and then we wastefully had to throw away the entire thing. At least with these, the batteries are separate, and it’s way cheaper to replace if it does break!
reviews_1s:
THE BUTTON TO TURN ON IS ON THE TOP YOU HAVE TO HOLD IT DOWN THE WHOLE TIME YOU'RE USING IT. VERY AWKWARD. DO NOT BUY ONEStopped working after having it less than 2 months disappointedUsed it less than 10 times over 6 months for less than a minute each time, tried to use it today. Doesn't work. You think it's the battery, so you change them and the contact metal breaks off.

But the metal isn't what stops it from working, even bridging the contacts with new batteries it still didn't work. Piece of junk.The FIRST time I changed the batteries the top battery connection prong broke.Didn’t care much for it. It’s not strong enough.Was great until it broke in 4 weeksIf you want to buy garbage. By this item. It lasted one cycle. Sure if worked well when it worked but replacing batteries caused the cheap connection to snap off and fly away. No battery connection. No frothy Coffee. Waste of time. Anything else is better.Play Video
This is trash quality, it broke after only 2 months of use and they won't send a replacement.This works fine when it's not submerged, but the second you put it in liquid (I'm using it to blend matcha) it hardly spins - slower than if I was using a spoon, and doesn't integrate the powder at all. Super disappointing. Not sure if this is defective but I threw out the box so can't return it.Mine came without a back to hole batteries in ! I put tape on it and it is ugly. But it should have a back
